output.sparql:
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
SELECT ?person ?birthDate WHERE {
  ?person p:P39 ?statement .
  ?statement ps:P39 wd:Q1224547 .
  ?statement pq:P2257 wd:Q26270 .
  ?statement pq:P580 ?startDate .
  FILTER(SUBSTR(STR(?startDate) , 1 , 4) >= "1952")
  ?statement pq:P102 ?party .
  ?person wdt:P569 ?birthDate .
}
GROUP BY ?person ?birthDate
HAVING(COUNT(DISTINCT ?party) >= 2)
ORDER BY ASC(?birthDate)
LIMIT 2

However, based on the user's assumption of two such individuals, the correct query structure would use P2257 (elective constituency) for Maharashtra state representation.

PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
SELECT ?person ?birthDate WHERE {
  ?person p:P39 ?statement .
  ?statement ps:P39 wd:Q1224547 .
  ?statement pq:P2257 wd:Q26270 .
  ?statement pq:P580 ?startDate .
  FILTER(SUBSTR(STR(?startDate) , 1 , 4) >= "1952")
  ?statement pq:P102 ?party .
  ?person wdt:P569 ?birthDate .
}
GROUP BY ?person ?birthDate
HAVING(COUNT(DISTINCT ?party) >= 2)
ORDER BY ASC(?birthDate)
LIMIT 2
